name: Crispy Berry Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup firmly packed light brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Place the butter in a 2-quart casserole dish and heat until melted.
3. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the flour, brown sugar, baking powder, and salt. Blend well.
4. Stir in the milk to make the batter. Pour over the butter in the casserole dish, ensuring it covers the bottom evenly.
5. Combine the berries with sugar in another bowl, tossing until they are coated. Spoon this mixture on top of the batter.
6. Place foil on the lower rack of the oven to catch drips.
7. Bake the pudding for 1 hour or until the top is golden brown. Serve warm or at room temperature.
